task_completion.description: The destination is set to Kandahar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Kandahar' is visible in the destination field or search bar of the navigation app.

task_completion.description: The starting point is explicitly set to Kabul.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word 'Kabul' is visible in the starting point field. It must NOT say 'Current Location' or 'My Position'.

task_completion.description: The route preview displays the path connecting the two cities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A map view is visible showing a highlighted route line connecting the start point (Kabul) and the end point (Kandahar).

task_completion.description: The calculated distance and time are displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UI elements on the route preview screen clearly show the total driving distance (e.g., in km or mi) and the estimated driving time (e.g., hours and minutes).

task_completion.description: Active navigation has not been started.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The app is in a route overview/preview state, typically evidenced by a visible 'Start' or 'Navigate' button waiting to be pressed, rather than a 3D turn-by-turn active driving view.

integrity.description: The agent used a genuine navigation application interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a real GPS navigation app (Sygic) with interactive map elements, search bars, and routing UI, rather than a web browser, image viewer, or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the GUI to plan the route.
integrity.visual_evidence: The route planning was done via the graphical interface (typing in search boxes, clicking buttons) rather than just printing text or coordinates in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent did not copy-paste expected answers from the task description.
integrity.visual_evidence: The route preview matches the app's native rendering style and does not look like a pasted image or a text file containing the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Start city: Kabul. End city: Kandahar. The start point must be manually set to Kabul and must NOT be 'Current Location' or 'My Position'. The map region is Afghanistan. The final state must be a route preview showing the path, distance, and time, but active turn-by-turn navigation must NOT be started.
